sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94940" key="skirra/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκιρράς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκίρρος</orth>, <sense id="n94940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκῖρος</ref> </xr> </sense> <sense n="3" id="n94940.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκίρρον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐρᾰφ-ρρός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐρᾰφ-ρρόομαι</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐρᾰ´φ-ρρων</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐρᾰ´φ-ρρωσις</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκιρ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
